consent_items.title: Amend Memorandums of Understanding for Represented Employee Groups to Include Cesar Chavez Day as a Paid City Holiday
consent_items.recommendation: Adopt a Resolution amending Memorandums of Understanding (MOUs) for represented employee groups to include Cesar Chavez Day as a paid city holiday, to be observed on the last Monday of March beginning in 2025.

action_items.title: 2025 City Council Referral Prioritization Results Using Re-Weighted Range Voting (RRV)
action_items.recommendation: Review the completed Re-Weighted Range Voting (RRV) rankings for all outstanding City Council referrals and adopt a Resolution approving the list of prioritized referrals to city staff.
